allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: AMB Check - Ambulance Inspection System

Features:
- Authentication system with NextAuth v5 (4 roles)
- Multi-role inspection workflow (Driver, Equipment, Nurse, HOD)
- QR code scanning and generation
- HOD approval dashboard
- PDF export for inspection reports
- Inspection history with advanced filters
- Statistics dashboard with charts (Pie, Line, Bar)
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Bilingual interface (Thai/English)
- Mock data support for development
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS

Tech Stack:
- Next.js 15 + TypeScript
- NextAuth v5
- Vercel Postgres
- Recharts, jsPDF, html2canvas
- html5-qrcode, qrcode.react

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
